title: Coremar's Simplistica
body:
Coremar's Simplistica offers simplified textures and GUI for vanilla Minecraft, preserving the original resolution and color scheme while simplifying the visuals. The goal is to make everything as simple as possible without completely losing the familiar feel of the game. This pack is not designed to increase performace, and it most likely won't affect performance in any way. Optifine is not needed for Simplistica to fully function.

-------------------------------------------------------------------
This pack is currently work in progress, most blocks, GUI, particles and entities are done, some require further work. As of now no items are done yet, some entities are still missing. (I would like to say "coming soon", but it's still about 1.5K files so it will take some time.) Anything present might change in the future.
